name: Captain Marvel
description: Carol Susan Jane Danvers, a former Air Force pilot, gained cosmic powers when exposed to the energy of a Kree device called the Tesseract. As Captain Marvel, she can fly at light speed, project photon energy blasts, and absorb virtually unlimited amounts of energy. She is one of the most powerful beings in the known universe, capable of destroying capital ships single-handedly. Her human resilience combined with cosmic-level power makes her the Avengers' ultimate weapon against extinction-level threats.
